seoTitle: Brown Beach vs Brownlow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Brown Beach and Brownlow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Brown Beach vs Brownlow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Brown Beach and Brownlow.
heading: Brown Beach vs Brownlow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Brown Beach, South Australia and Brownlow, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Brownlow has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Brown Beach (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Brown Beach or Brownlow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Brown Beach has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Brownlow scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Brown Beach scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Brownlow scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Brown Beach or Brownlow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Brownlow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
